title: heliotropium assurgens
intro: Heliotropium assurgens, also known as the ascending heliotrope, is a plant species that belongs to the borage family (Boraginaceae). It has been traditionally used in folk medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and expectorant effects. The plant's health benefits include relief from respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and asthma, as well as its ability to treat skin conditions and wounds. The herbal preparations of Heliotropium assurgens can be found in various forms, including teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are often used to treat these ailments.
